payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Dark brown leather single-seat recliner with padded, tufted back and cushioned armrests; visible reclining lever on the right side, leather surface shows creases and slight sheen indicating wear; object is edge-cropped/partial in the image and appears approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
